summary.text: **Summarizing final code changes with file references**

payload.message:
**ForwardRef Fix**
- Wrapped both `AutoSuggestInput` variants in `forwardRef`, merging the forwarded ref with Floating UI’s `setReference` so the underlying `InputControl` receives the DOM ref (`src/ui/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:98`, `src/ui/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:154`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:96`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:151`).
- Updated the UI and builder `SmartyAddressInput` components to forward refs through to `AutoSuggestInput`, allowing `Controller` to register the input without warnings (`src/ui/components/formControls/compositions/SmartyAddressInput/SmartyAddressInput.tsx:18`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/SmartyAddressInput/SmartyAddressInput.tsx:16`).

I didn’t run automated tests—please rerun the form flow that triggered the warning (and any relevant unit tests) to confirm the fix.

content.text:
**ForwardRef Fix**
- Wrapped both `AutoSuggestInput` variants in `forwardRef`, merging the forwarded ref with Floating UI’s `setReference` so the underlying `InputControl` receives the DOM ref (`src/ui/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:98`, `src/ui/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:154`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:96`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/AutoSuggestInput/AutoSuggestInput.tsx:151`).
- Updated the UI and builder `SmartyAddressInput` components to forward refs through to `AutoSuggestInput`, allowing `Controller` to register the input without warnings (`src/ui/components/formControls/compositions/SmartyAddressInput/SmartyAddressInput.tsx:18`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/SmartyAddressInput/SmartyAddressInput.tsx:16`).

I didn’t run automated tests—please rerun the form flow that triggered the warning (and any relevant unit tests) to confirm the fix.
